name: Blue Cheese Spread
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Maytag, Oregon Danish or blue cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop the walnut pieces using short pulses in a food processor.
2. Add the blue cheese and cream cheese to the chopped walnuts.
3. Process until thoroughly combined.
4. Stir in the cognac and process until well mixed.
5. Transfer the mixture into one large or two small ramekins.
6. Sprinkle minced walnuts on top for garnish.
Yield: 3/4 cup (8 to 10 appetizer servings)
